title: Lunglei DEO Pi Navneet Mann chuan SIR kalpui mekah khawpui chhunga BLO-te tlawhin, an hma lakna a enpui
content:
971/2026-2027

Dated Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 11:Lunglei District Election Officer (DEO) Pi Navneet Mann chuan vawiin khan electoral roll en nawn runpui, Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui mek chungchangah Lungleia Booth Level Officer (BLO) ṭhenkhatte an hna thawhna hmunah tlawhin, an hma lakna a enpui.

Lunglei DEO Pi Navneet Mann hian Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huam chhunga BLO panga tlawhin, Enumeration Form sem, lak khawm leh digitise kawnga an hma laknate a hmunah hmuhpuiin, an hma lak dan hrang hrang leh harsatna an neihte a sawipui.

Lunglei District Election Officer hian Chanmari-II, Chanmari-III, Serkawn-II, Electric Veng-III leh Bazar Veng-II BLO te a tlawh a. Special Intensive Revision kalpui mekah voter ṭhenkhat an awmna chin hriat tawh loh te leh hmun danga insawn tawh te chu uluk leh chik taka thliar tura chahin, voter te tihpalh thil thua paih (delete) an awm lohna turin fimkhur hle turin a chah bawk.

BLO-te a tlawh kualnaah hian Lunglei DEO Pi Navneet Mann hi Electoral Registration Officer (ERO), Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) leh Election Officer te'n an ṭawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hovin UD&PA Department official te leh AMC Corporators ten thawhhona zanriah an eiho
content:
970/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 11th June, 2026:UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga hoin zanin khan UD&PA Department official te leh AMC Corporators thlan tharte chuan Aizawl Sumtualah zanriah an ei hova, Aizawl khawpui enkawlna kawngah chak taka thawhho tlan zel an tum.

Zanriah eiho pah hian PowerPoint presentation hmangin khawpui enkawlna atana Swachh Bharat Mission 2.0 tangkai zawka hman dan tur leh AMC lam atanga Solid Waste Management Rules thar tha taka zawm a nih theih nana hma an lak tawh dan leh hma lak zel dan tur sawiho a ni a, inkawmhona hun hlawk thlak takin an hmang ho a ni. Bawhhlawh reng reng chi li-ah thliar hran a ngaih tawh dawn avangin tha taka mipuite zitirna kalpui chhunzawm zel ni se an ti bawk.

Pu K. Sapdanga, Minister, UD&PA Department chuan state sorkar hmasate leh AMC a roreltu hmasaten hma an lakna zarah Aizawlah rorelna mumal a awm chho zel tih a sawi a. AMC a roreltu thar ten Aizawl chu inenkawlna felfai leh dinhmun sang zawkah an hlankai ngei a beisei thu a sawi a. AMC roreltu tharte leh Department lama hnathawktute chu tha taka thawk hova, team work tha tak kengkawh zel turin a fuih a. Taima taka thawhna chuan hmasawnna eng emaw tak, lukhawng nei a thlen ngei thin tih hre chunga tih tak zeta thawk zel turin a ngen bawk. Aizawl khawpui himna tura tuiluankawr siam mek, Storm Drain Project, chu tangkai taka kalpui a nih theih nana thawhho zel a tul thu a sawi a. AMC chu mawhphurhna lian zawk pawh pek zel an duh thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu H. Lalremtluanga, AMC Mayor chuan Minister hmalaknaa AMC leh UD&PA ten thawhhona awmze nei leh tha an nei thei dawn nia a lang chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. UD&PA Minister chungah AMC a ngaih pawimawh tak tak avangin lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

Inkawmhona hunah hian Pu K. Sapdanga, UD&PA Minister; Pu H. Lalremtluanga, AMC Mayor; AMC Executive Corporator te leh Corporator te bakah UD&PA Department atangin Pu K. Lalthawmmawia, Commissioner & Secretary; Pu CC Lalchhuangkima, CEO, Aizawl Smart City Ltd.; Pi Zarzokimi, Joint Secretary, UD&PA leh Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director, UD&PA Department te pawh an tel a ni.

title: Kawrthah Forest Division-ah Green Mizoram Day, 2026 hmang
content:
969/2026-2027

Dated Mamit, the 11th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Green Mizoram Day, 2026 chu Kawrthah Forest Division chuan Division huam chhunga Range hrang hrangah hman a ni.

Kumina Green Mizoram Day thupui "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" tih chu Division chhunga khaw hrang hrangah thing hlutna te inhrilh thar a ni a. Kan rama thing leh mau chỉ hrang hrangte leh Nungchate humhalh a tul zia inzirtir thar lehin thingtiak emawzat semchhuah leh phun belh a ni a. Kum hmasa lama thing phun tawhsa te samfai leh a hungna te siam that leh a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: 'THING HI RANGKACHAK ANGA HLU , NUNNA TINRENG BUL A NI' TIH THUPUI HMANGIN KOLASIBAH GREEN MIZORAM DAY HMAN A NI
content:
968/2026-2027

Dated Kolasib: The 11th June, 2026:Vawiin  khan 'Thing hi Rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni' tih thupui a hmanginParish Hall, Venglai KolasibahGreen Mizoram Day hman a ni a. Pu Lalfamkima, Dy.Speaker chuan khuallian niin he hun hi a hman pui.

Khuallian Pu Lalfamkima chuan kan ram ngaw te kum tinin a zim tawlh tawlh tih a sawi a, hei vang hian kan rama ngaw te hi awmze nei zawka humhalh dan kan zawn a ngai a ti. 'Kan ei leh in tur kan neih theih nan ram ngaw tha kan mamawh tih sawiin, 'Kan thawk tur boruak thianghlim kan neih theih nan thing kan mamawh a, in tur tui thianghlim kan neih that theih nan thing kan mamawh a. Kan ei tur kan thar theih nan Lei tha kan mamawh a, chutiang chu ram ngaw atangin kan nei thei ani a ti a. Hei vang hian thing hi rangkachak aiin a hlu zawk a, Mihring te min chawmtu a ni tih kan hriat thar a tul a ti.

Dy Speaker chuan, khawvel thang zelah changkanna kawng kan zawh zel a, hmasawnna hna kan thawh tam tak hian Ram ngaw a ti chereu lo thei lo a. Hei vang hian a in balance theih nan hma kan lak a ngai a. Thing phun kan uar a tul hle a ni' a ti a. Pu Famkima chuan Green Mizoram Day ah thing tiak tam tak kan phun thin. Kan thingphun te kan enkawl a, kan vil zui a pawimawh a ti bawk.

He hun kaihhruaitu nibawk Pu H. Dolianbuaia, District Bawrhsap Kolasib pawhin thu sawiin, Thing leh Mihringte hi kan in kungkaih tlat a ni a ti a. Kan khawvel a lum zel a, kan khawvel lum zel laka min chhawk thei tur chuan thing kan phun tam a ngai a ti a. Kumin a thing phuntu department te chuan an thingpuite an enkawl a ngaih thu sawiin, Thal chho ah te a bul vel sam fai a, leitha te an pek a tul dawn thu sawiin, a thi a lo awm palh a nih pawhin a danga an thlak a ngai thu sawiin, hei hi department ten inelna ah an hmang dawn tih a sawi.

He hun hmanna a hian kumin a Fire Prevention hman laia kangmei venna kawnga thawk tha te hnenah Khuallian hian lawmman a sem a, Kangmei venna lama hma la tha ber ah Serkhan thlan niin Khuangpuilam chu 2 na an ni a, 3 na chu Pangbalkawn an ni. Saipum, Thingthelh leh Nisapui ten consolation Prize an dawng bawk a ni.

He programme zawh a hian District Sports Stadium, Kolasib bul hnai velah Dy. Speaker, Deputy Commissioner leh official dang ten thing tiak phunna hun an neih zuih bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER ADDRESSES THE 11TH NITI AAYOG GOVERNING COUNCIL MEETING
content:
167/2026-2027

Aizawl, 11th June 2026:The 11th Meeting of the NITI Aayog Governing Council, chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, was held today at the Rashtrapati Bhavan Cultural Centre, New Delhi. The theme of this year's meeting was "Human Capital for Viksit Bharat." Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma attended the meeting and delivered an address highlighting Mizoram's achievements, aspirations, and development priorities.

In his address, the Chief Minister stated that Mizoram has become the first fully literate state in India and has recorded significant progress in the Human Development Index. He noted that all districts of Mizoram have been categorized as "Front Runners" in the North Eastern Region District Sustainable Development Index Report.

In alignment with the national vision of Viksit Bharat 2047, the State Government is implementing its own roadmap, "Transformed Mizoram 2047." Mizoram aims to contribute 1% to India's GDP by the year 2047.

The Chief Minister emphasized that achieving full literacy is only the beginning. The Government is now focusing on strengthening digital literacy, financial literacy, skill development, and entrepreneurship. Young people are being equipped with skills relevant to emerging industries and technologies, including Electric Vehicle (EV) Maintenance, Drone Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Solar Technology. During the last financial year, around 26,500 youths have received various forms of skill training, with more than 72 percent securing employment thereafter. He also highlighted Mizoram's achievement as the Champion State in the IndiaSkills North East Regional Competition 2025–26.

Recognizing the importance of innovation and entrepreneurship, the State Government has launched the Chief Minister's Innovation Challenge, involving Government Departments, Civil Society Organizations, educational institutions, and grassroots stakeholders. To support aspiring entrepreneurs and start-ups, the Government has also established the Mizoram Handholding Venture Capital Fund.

The Chief Minister further stressed the importance of digital transformation. Mizoram today ranks among the best-connected states in the North East in terms of telecom infrastructure and has achieved a tele-density of 112. The State has successfully implemented e-Office systems, initiated the digitization of land records, and expanded the delivery of digital public services.

Referring to the Prime Minister's vision for the North East, the Chief Minister strongly advocated for the implementation of the recommendations of the High-Level Committee on the North East Economic Corridor (NEEC). The proposal envisages an integrated "One Grid Approach" for the North East, covering roads, railways, air connectivity, inland waterways, power transmission, telecommunications, and logistics infrastructure. He described the proposal as a transformative initiative that would greatly benefit all North Eastern states.It may be noted that Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma serves as the Convener of the High-Level Committee on NEEC, and the Committee's recommendations were formally submitted to Union Home Minister and Chairman of the NEC Plenary, Shri Amit Shah, during the NEC Plenary Meeting held on 4 June 2026.

The Chief Minister also advocated for a cluster-based investment strategy that recognizes the unique strengths of individual North Eastern states. He also underscored Mizoram's immense tourism potential and stressed the importance of realizing the Thenzawl Peace City Project. Furthermore, he requested special support from the Central Government for Mizoram's Handholding Programme, which aligns closely with the objectives of Viksit Bharat 2047.

Appreciating the positive impact of the NITI Aayog State Support Mission in Mizoram, the Chief Minister expressed hope for the early launch of State Support Mission 2.0.

Responding to the Prime Minister's call for fuel conservation, the Chief Minister outlined several initiatives undertaken by the Mizoram Government, including the observance of "No Official Vehicle Day" every Wednesday, the reduction of VIP convoy sizes, and public awareness campaigns promoting walking and the use of public transportation.

Concluding his address, the Chief Minister reaffirmed that Mizoram's development journey towards Viksit Bharat is firmly grounded in knowledge, inclusiveness, peace, good governance, and environmental sustainability. He reiterated the State Government's commitment to contributing meaningfully towards the realization of Viksit Bharat 2047 with the continued support and cooperation of the Prime Minister, the Government of India, and NITI Aayog.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN NITI AAYOG 11TH GOVERNING COUNCIL-AH THU A SAWI
content:
967/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 11th June 2026:Vawiin khan Rashtrapati Bhavan Cultural Centre, New Delhi-ah Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi kaihhruaiin NITI Aayog Governing Council vawi 11-na neih a ni a. He Council thupui atan hian Human Capital for Viksit Bharat tih chu hman a ni. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma pawh telin, thusawina a nei.

Chief Minister thusawi tlangpui chu:

1. Mizoram chu India rama fully literate state hmasa ber kan ni a, tun hnaiah Human Development Index-ah kan thang chak hle a, hmarchhak bial District Sustainable Development Index report-ah kan district zawng zawngte chu hmahruaitu (front runner) an ni mek vek a ni. Viksit Bharat 2047 milin Transformed Mizoram 2047 kan kalpui mek a. Kum 2047-ah khian Mizoram chuan India ram GDP-ah 1% lo thawhchhuah ve theih kan tum a ni.

2. Full Literacy-ah hian kan duh tawk mai lo va, digital literacy lamah te, financial literacy lamah te, skills & entrepreneur lamah te tan kan la zui zel a. Kan thalaite hi tunlai thiamna sang zel mila hnathawk thei turin kan buatsaih. EV Maintenance te, Drone technology te, Artificial Intelligence leh Solar Technology thlengin training kan pe a. Sorkar kum kalta chhung khan thalai 26,500 te chu skill training chi hrang hrang kan pe a, an zinga zaa 72 aia tam mahin hna an hmu zui a. India Skills Northeast Regional Competition 2025-26 ah Mizoram state chu Champion State a ni.

3. Innovation & Entrepreneurship hi tih makmawh a ni tih kan hriat avangin Chief Minister’s Innovation Challenge kan kalpui a, sorkar Department te, Civil Society Organisation te, College leh Grassroot lam thlengin an tel a. Start-ups leh entrepreneur bultan chho mekte thawhpuina tur Mizoram Handholding Venture Capital Fund kan siam bawk.

4. Digital lama hmasawnna hi kan ngaihpawimawh ber zinga mi a ni a. Tunah hian hmarchhak biala telecom network nei tha ber zinga mi kan ni a, kan Tele-density pawh 112 a ni. e-office kan kalpui tawh a, land record kan digitised chho a, mipuite hnenah digital service langtlang takin kan pe chho tan mek.

5. Hmarchhak tana Prime Minister hmathlir ropui tak tihhlawhtlinna kawngah High Level Committee on North East Economic Corridor rawtna kha tihhlawhtlin theih a tha hle a. Kha rawtna khan kawngpui, rel kawng, thlawhnaa inkalpawhna, tui lama inkalpawhna, Power inthlunzawmna, Telecom inthlunzawmna leh bungraw phurh kualna lamah hmarchhak state-te hi mual khata thlirin (one grid approach) ruahmanna a duang a. Kan za atana hlawk tlanna, kan chhawrtlan tur rawtna a ni, a ti.

High Level Committee on NEEC Convener hi Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma a ni a, an rawtna hi June ni 4 khan NEC Plenary-ah Home Minister leh NEC Plenary Chairman Pu Amit Shah hnenah a lo thehlut tawh a ni.

1. Heng bakah hian Chief Minister hian, Act East Policy leh Indo-Myanmar-Thailand Trilateral Highway tihhlawhtlin thuai a tulna te, economic hmasawnna ngaihtuah ruala vantlang nun him leh ralmuang nei tura hmalak a tul thu te, investment chu hmarchhak bial pum thlira state tinte chakna lai hre chunga a hlawm (cluster) a kalpui a that thu te, Mizoram chu Tourism lama theihna sang tak nei a nih thu te, Thenzawl Peace City tihhlawhtlin ngei a tul thu te a tarlang a. Mizoram sorkar Handholding Programme chu Viksit Bharat 2047 tihhlawhtlinna programme a nih avangin sorkar laipuiin special support pe thei se a duh thu a thlen bawk.

2. NITI Aayog State Support Mission Mizoram tana a tangkai thu sawiin, State Support Mission 2.0 lo chhuak thuai se tha a tih thu a sawi a. Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi ngenna anga oil leh gas renchem kawnga Mizoram sorkar hmalakna tlangpui pawh tarlangin - Nilaini apianga “No Official Vehicle Day” kalpui a nih thu te, VIP convoy tihtlem a nih thu te, mipuite hnena kea kal uar tur leh public transport hmang uar tura inzirtirna kalpui a nih thute a tarlang.

Mizoramin Viksit Bharat tihlawhtling tura ke a penna tinte chu hriatna behchhan, mitin huapzo, remna leh muanna ngaihlu leh environment humhalh duhna nen a kal a ni zel a. Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi te, sorkar laipui leh NITI Aayog te thawhpuina hnuaiah Viksit Bharat 2047 hi tihhlawhtlin ngei kan tum tlat a ni, tih leh thil dangte a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman a ni
content:
966/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 11:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Level Committee on Greeen Mizoram buatsaihin Lunglei District-ah "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, nunna tinreng bul a ni" tih thupui hmangin Green Mizoram Day hman a ni a. Ṭhaizawl Community Hall-ah Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi hovin a hawnna hun hman a ni.

Lungleia Green Mizoram Day 2026 hawngtu SDO (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi chuan mihringte nunna bul boruak thianghlim (oxygen) siamtu thing leh maute humhalh leh phun belh zel a ṭul thu sawiin, ramngaw kan tihchereu hian mihring tan mai bakah nungcha dangte tan pawh a pawi em em a, chu vangin ramngaw humhalh leh thing phun kawngah nasa zawka ṭan lak a ṭul, a ti a. Green Mizoram Day puala sawrkar department leh tlawmngai pawlte'n thing an phun ṭhin chu thil ṭha tak a nih laiin, a puitlin theihna tura enkawl zui kawngah ṭan lak a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Sik leh sa nuam, boruak thianghlim nei turin mi tinin mawhphurhna kan nei tiin, thing phun thar leh phun sa enkawl zui kawngah ṭan la thar ṭheuh turin kal khawmte a chah.

Lunglei District Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Officer Dr Lalmuanpuia Samte chuan hun kaihruaiin, Evan. C. Lalsawma, Ṭhaizawl chuan hunserh a hmang a. DLCGM Member Secretary, Lunglei Divisional Forest Officer Pu Lalduhthlana chuan report pein, District Level Committee-in Green Mizoram Day-a thing phunte enfiah vek ni se a tih anga enfiah a nih thu leh kum 2024-a Lawngtlai lam kawnga pawl 54 te'n thing ṭiak 1,176 an phun zingah a nung ṭha 678 leh a thi 498 a awm thu a sawi a. Tun ṭumah hian chu'ng thing phun thi 498 chu a thara thlakleh a hungna chhiate siam ṭhat tur a nih thu a sawi.

He hunah hian kumin ṭhal laia kangmei veng ṭha khua/veng lawmman, Village Level Fire Prevention Award 2026 sem niin, SDO (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi chuan lawmman pawisa fai leh certificate a hlan a. Pakhatna Mausen (₹70,000), pahnihna Zotuitlang (₹50,000) leh pathumna Lungrang South (₹30,000) te niin, khaw pathum – Ṭhaizawl, Mualṭhuam North leh Hmuntlang te hnenah consolation prize ₹10,000 ṭheuh hlan a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Ṭhaizawl Village Council President Pi C. Lalngaihsaki pawhin thu sawiin, MHIP Sub-Headquarters Lunglei President Pi Lalliannguri'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Hawnna hun hman zawh hian SDO (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi, DLCGM member-te leh office hrang hrang hotute chuan hmun ruahman saah thing ṭiak an phun a. Hemi hnu hian Lunglei leh Ṭhaizawl inkar National Highway kawngpui dunga department leh pawl hrang hrangte'n kum 2024-a an thing phun tawh sate tifaiin, a thi thlakna thing ṭiak thar an phun belh bakah a hungna an siam ṭha nghal bawk.

Green Mizoram Day hi a tirah chuan "Green Aizawl" tiin kum 1998 khan Aizawlah hman ṭan niin, kum 1999 aṭangin "Green Mizoram" tih hming chawiin ram pumah thing phun ni atan hman a ni a. Nikum khan Lunglei tui lakna, Pialthleng leh Tlawng hnarah Lungleia department leh pawl hrang hrang 55 te'n thing ṭiak 1,203 an phun a, EF&CC Department chhinchhiah danin 859 (71.40%) a la nung a. EF&CC Department chuan kum 2025 chhung khan Lunglei District-ah mimal, VC leh pawl hrang hrang hnenah thing ṭiak phun tur 40,777 an sem chhuak.

Attachment

title: GREEN MIZORAM DAY 2026 OBSERVED IN LAWNGTLAI WITH THE THEME “TREES ARE GREEN GOLD, THE ROOTS  OF ALL LIFE”
content:
166/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 11th June 2026:Green Mizoram Day 2026 was observed in Lawngtlai today with the theme “Trees are green gold, the roots of all life.” A short programme was held at the Deputy Commissioner’s Office premises at 10:30 AM, followed by a tree plantation drive along the Lawngtlai–Kawlchaw road.

The short programme at the DC’s office premises was chaired by Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga. Chief Executive Member, LADC, Shri C. Lalsawmzuala attended the programme as the Chief Guest.

In his speech, Shri C. Lalsawmzuala said that our forefathers did not leave behind a barren land, but gifted us rich forests and diverse wildlife. However, due to negligence in protecting them, they have been greatly damaged. He stressed that more trees should be planted and nurtured until they grow fully in order to restore the environment.He also highlighted the need for the younger generation to take greater responsibility in protecting forests, following the example of their ancestors who cared for Mizoram’s natural resources. He appealed to the people of Lawngtlai to actively participate in tree plantation so that a beautiful and sustainable environment can be left for future generations.

As part of Green Mizoram Day 2026, the CEM, LADC presented a Certificate of Appreciation to the Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai, in recognition of his efforts towards the development of the district.Awards were also presented to villages selected by the District Level Fire Prevention Committee for their good performance in fire prevention: 1st Prize: Rulkual, 2nd Prize: Siachangkawn, 3rd Prize: Diltlang South andConsolation Prizes: Thaltlang, Lawngtlai Vengpui and Chawnhu. Awards were also given to winners of newspaper articles on fire prevention and Reels-making competitions related to fire safety awareness.

After the programme at the DC’s office premises, various departments planted 420 saplings along the Sihtlangpui–Kawlchaw stretch and properly protected them. The Chief Guest, CEM, LADC, Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai, and other dignitaries also planted trees at designated plantation sites.

Tree plantation activities under Green Mizoram Day have been systematically recorded since 2019. Up to this year, a total of 2,079 saplings have been planted.

Attachment

title: "Thing hi Rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" TIH THUPUIAH HMANGIN LAWNGTLAIAH GREEN MIZORAM DAY 2026- HMAN A NI
content:
965/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 11th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 10:30 AM khan "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" tih thupui hmangin Lawngtlaiah 'Green Mizoram Day 2026' chu Deputy Commissioner Office tualzawlah inkhawm tawi leh Lawngtlai leh Kawlchaw inkarah te thingphuna hun hman a ni.

Bawrhsap tualzawla inkhawmna tawi hi Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kaihruaiin Chief Executive Member, LADC Pu C.Lalsawmzuala chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Thusawiin Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan , Pi leh Pute khan ramruak ringawt min hnutchhiah lova, Ramngaw tha tak, nungcha chitin min hnutchhiah a, a enkawltuten kan duatloh vangin a chereu nasa a, siamtha tur chuan uar zawka Thing phun a, a puitlin thlenga enkawl a tul a ni, a ti. Pi leh Puten Mizoram an lo enkawl tawh dan ngaihtuah chungin, Thangtharte hian ram ngawt humhalh kawngah tan lak thar a tul hle tih a tarlang a. Mizoram rawn luahzel turte tana ram nuam leh chhenfakawm zawk hnutchhiah hi mitin mawhphurhna a ni tiin, Thingphun i uar deuh deuh turin Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm a ni.

Green Mizoram Day, 2026 ah hian CEM, LADC chuan Lawngtlai Deputy Commissioner chu kawng hrang hranga District hmasawnna atan theihtawp a chhuah vangin 'Certificate of Appreciation' a hlan a. District Level Fire Prevention Committee- in kangmei vengtha Veng/khua a thlan te; Pakhat na - Rulkual, Pahnih na - Siachangkawn, Pathum na- Diltlang South bakah Consolation Prize- Thaltlang, Lawngtlai Vengpui leh Chawnhu hnen ah lawmman hlan niin, Chanchinbua Kangmei ven chungchang ziak thate leh Kangmei ven inzirtirna lam haawia Reels - insiamsiaka lawmman late hnenah hlan an ni bawk.

Bawrhsap tualzawla hun hman zawh hnu hian Sihtlangpui leh Kawlchaw inkarah Department hrang hrang ten Thing tiak 420 phunin, tha takin an hung a. Green Mizoram Day - a khuallian CEM, LADC, Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai leh mipawimawh dangten a bika an phunna tur ruahmanah Thing hi an phun bawk a ni.

Green Mizoram Day - pual Thingphun te hi kum 2019 atang khan mumal taka chhinchhiah tan niin, kumin thleng hian Thing tiak - 2079 phun tawh a ni.

Attachment

title: Tuikual South High School  atanga  Tuikual Primary School kawng Khar/Block chungchanga Aizawl SP thuchhuah
content:
964/2026-2027

Aizawl the 11th June, 2026:Mizoram State Sorkar Notification No.B.12021/10/04-TRP Dt.22.8.2008 leh Section 115 of MV Act, 1988-in thuneihna a pek ang leh Ace Alliance Pvt. Ltd.-te ngenna angin Pu C. Vanlalvena, Superintendent of Police, Traffic, Aizawl chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

title: CHAMPHAIAH GREEN MIZORAM DAY, 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
962/2026-2027

Green Mizoram Day 2026 chu vawiin khan District Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin Champhai ah pawh hman a ni.

Green Mizoram Day hmanpuitu Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan thusawiin Mizoram ah kum thum bawr vel chauh la awm mahse a boruak nuam a tih thu a sawi a, India ram hmun dang chu khawlum a nasat em avangin an khuaa a haw chang pawhin Mizoram a ngaih thin thu a sawi a, Mizoram ah pawh Champhai chu boruak thiang nuam a tih ber thu a tarlang.

Mizoram ah chuan hmasawnna hnathawh  a nih dawn apianga environment ngaihpawimawh a ni thin te chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Development leh Environment a kalkawp tlat loh chuan boruak thianghlim a awm theih loh thu a sawi a, chutiang ni tur chuan mitin ten thing phun mai bakah a humhalh kawngah thanharh a tul thu a sawi a, chutihrualin hah taka thing an phun tawh sa te, tleirawl hawklak leh kut hlei ten an lo thai rang thin chu pawi a tih thu a sawi a.

Green Mizoram Day ah chauh thing leh mau humhalh lovin nitin humhalh a tul tih a sawi a, mahni theih tawkah thing phun uar zel a ngai tih a sawi bawk. DFO staff te bakah Department hrang hrang staff te, NGO hrang hrang kalkhawmte chu chibai a buk a, hun nuam tak hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a, DFO chhuak mai turin Champhai tana a hnathawh hlawk thlak tak tak te chu fakawm a tih thu leh a kalzelna turah pawh hna tha a thawh zel theihna turin duhsakna a hlan bawk.

He hun hi Sikpui Run, Champhai Zote ah hman a ni a, thupui atan "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, nunna tinreng bul a ni." tih hman a ni a, DFO Pu Lalbiakchama Chawngthu, member secretary chuan Green Mizoram Day, 2026 Champhai District hawnna inkhawm hi a kaihruai a, Green Mizoram Day lo chhuah dan a tarlang bawk.

Green Mizoram Day, 2026 pual hian Zote tiau kawng dung sir tluanin thing phun a ni a, sawrkar Department hrang hrang bakah NGO te chu thingphunna tur hmun siamsak theuh an ni a, anmahni chanpual theuhah thing an phun a ni.

Kum 1999 khan Green Aizawl chu Green Mizoram tia thlak niin heta tang hian kum tin Green Mizoram Day hi hman a ni ta a, District Level Committee te hmalakna in thingphun thin a ni.

Attachment

title: Tlangnuam RD Block-in VB-G RAM G Act, 2025 zir hona a buatsaih
content:
961/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 11th June, 2026 :Tlangnuam RD Block buatsaihin vawiin khan Senhri Hall, BDO Office-ah Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025 (VB-G RAM G Act) chungchang zir hona, "Block Level Orientation Programme on VB-G RAM G" neih a ni.

He hun hi Pu Robert Vanlalnghaka, APO chuan kaihruaiin, Dr. Lalchamliani, BDO Tlangnuamin zir hona hun hi a hawng a. He hunah hian Tlangnuam RD Block-a thawktu ten VB-G RAM G Act kalpui tur atana pawimawh chi hrang hrangte chu Tlangnuam RD Block huam chhung khaw 13 atanga tel Village Employment Council Member-te an zirtir a ni.

MGNREGA thlakna tur Viksit Bharat Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (VB-G RAM G) chu July ni 1, 2026 atangin ram pumah hman tan tur a ni a. MGNREGA hnuaia ni 100 inhlawh thin chu tipungin ni 125 a inhlawh theih tawh dawn a. Mipui inhlawhna za zela za (100%) Sawrkar laipuiin a tum thin chu VB-G-RAM-G hnuaiah chuan Central leh State tum tur hi NE/Special Category State-ah 90:10 ratio a ni tawh dawn a, Mizoram sawrkar chuan 10% in a do let ve tawh dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: AMC Corporator (Lead Facilitator) ten Aizawl bawlhhlawh paihna hmun (Solid Waste Management Center, Tuirial) ah thing phun.
content:
960/2026-2027

Aizawl, 11th June, 2026:Vawiin khan World Environment Day - 2026 denchhenin June ni 5 atanga an hmalakna kal zelah AMC Corporator (Lead Facilitator) ten Aizawl bawlhhlawh paihna hmun (Solid Waste Management Center, Tuirial) ah thing an phun.

Tree Plantation Drive hi World Environment Day 2026 hnuaia ‘Ek Ped Maa ke Naam’ programme initiative anga hman a ni a, Aizawl Mayor Pu H. Lalremtluanga leh Corporator leh Official ten an nei a. Aizawl Mayor Pu H. Lalremtluanga chuan leilung chhe zel veng turin thing phun uar deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi a. Solid Waste Management Rule tharin a phut angin chhungkaw tinin kan bawlhhlawhte chi 4-a thliar hran a ngaih thu sawiin hei hi a sawngbawl kawnga hna pawimawh hmasa ber a ni, a ti a. Bawlhhlawh thliar hran kawnga tan la thar theuh turin chhung tinte a ngen nghal bawk a ni. Tin, Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026-in a phut angin bye-law siam mek a ni a, peih fel thuai a ni dawn, a ti bawk.

AMC Mayor chuan Bawlhhlawh paihna hmun Solid Waste Management Center, Tuirial-ah bawlhhlawh paih fin leh vek anga sawi awm thin chu a dik loh thu a sawi a. A paihna hmun hrang mumal tak siamin a theih anga tam sawngbawl a nih thu a sawi a. Material Recovery Facility, Luangmuala siam mek peih fel a nih hunah phei chuan bawlhhlawh thliar hran kawngah nasa lehzuala ṭan lak a ngaih dawn thu a sawi bawk.

World Environment Day 2026 pual hian AMC chuan nasa takin hma a la a. Special meeting kovin bawlhhlawh thliar hran leh sawngbawl kawnga hmalakna turte sawi a ni a. Aizawl khawpuia bawlhhlawh sawngbawlnain hma a sawn theih nan AMC Corporator ten theihtawp an chhuah dawn a. Ward tinah bawlhhlawh thliar hran chungchang campaign an nei a, ni 12th June, 2026 (Zirtawpni) hian Ward tina tihfai ngai hmun pakhat theuh hnatlang kovin an tifai dawn bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova Interacts with Students from Arunachal Pradesh University
content:
164/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 11th June, 2026:Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Minister Shri B. Lalchhanzova today held an interactive session at his office with second-year Post Graduate students of Mass Communication from Arunachal Pradesh University.

Expressing his happiness at receiving the students and having the opportunity to interact with them, Minister Shri B. Lalchhanzova stated that the youth of the Northeast possess immense talent, uniqueness, and potential. He encouraged the students to bring out these talents by thinking big, expressing their views confidently, developing self-confidence, and stepping out of their comfort zones. He also urged them to maintain strong cooperation and unity with youths from other Northeastern states, emphasizing that such a spirit would contribute not only to the development of their respective states but also to the progress of the Northeast region and India as a whole. Conveying his best wishes for their future, the Minister assured the students that the people and Government of Mizoram would always be ready to extend assistance and cooperation whenever needed.

Dr. Rajeev Lourembam, Head of Office, PIB Aizawl, spoke on journalism opportunities and framework in the Central Government sector. He informed the students about various career prospects available after completing their Mass Communication studies and encouraged them to continue enhancing their skills and gaining practical experience in line with industry requirements. Thereafter, Zalen newspaper editor and President of the Mizoram Journalists' Association, Shri Vanlalrema Vantawl, also briefed the students on the practice and framework of journalism in Mizoram.

Also speaking on the occasion, PS to the Minister Shri Remlalliana Hnamte observed that the advent of social media has enabled almost everyone to function as a journalist. While acknowledging the many benefits of social media, he also cautioned against its negative aspects, noting that it can create divisions within society based on ethnicity and identity. Considering the diverse ethnic and cultural composition of Arunachal Pradesh and the Northeast region, he urged the students to act responsibly and contribute towards preserving unity and harmony.

Shri Adam Saprinsanga, Editor of The Frontier Despatch also shared his experiences and insights from the field of journalism. He explained that journalism and media can serve as powerful tools for showcasing the unique characteristics, cultures, traditions, and identities of their region to the world, while also helping to bring new flavour to the narrative of the outside world. He encouraged the students to pursue whatever they do with passion and dedication.

The interactive session was moderated by IPRP&S Department Joint Director Smt. Mina Zoliani Joute, and it was attended by IPRP&S Deputy Director Shri Pratap Chhetri and other media personnel.

Attachment

title: Siaha-ah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman niin MADC a EM (Forest) chu Khuallian a ni.
content:
959/2026-2027

Siaha the 11th June 2026:Green Mizoram Day 2026 lawmna chu vawiin khan MADC Forest Hall, Siaha-ah hman a ni a. MADC a Forest changtu EM Pu Tiahlei Syuhlo chu Khuallian niin Addl DC Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan he hun hi a kaihruai.

Khuallian Pu Tiahlei Syuhlo chuan Green Mizoram Day inaugural programme a kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi a, kumin thupui atana thlan ‘Trees are the roots of all life’ tih chuan thing leh mau pawimawhna, thingtiak phun pawimawh zia a sawifiah chiang hlea a hriat thu a sawi.

EM (Forest ) chuan kumtinin thing tiak tam tak phun a ni thín a, phun tam ngaihtuahin puitling zui ta erawh chhiar tham lek a ni thìn chu veiawm a tih thu a sawi. Kumina Green Mizoram Day puala thingtiakte chu Forest department in tha leh zung, sum leh pai tam tak senga ramngaw atang leh state dang atanga theihtawpa a lakkhawm te an ni a, a enkawl zui kawngah thahnemngaihna tak tak nen tha thara tan lakpui turin kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

Pu Jimmy N Ramdina, DCF MADC chuan ‘Best Village in Combating Fire prevention’ award hlanna neiin a hnen atang hian report tawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Lawmman dawngtute chu:

1. Tokalo  : Citation + Rs 50,000/-

2.  Amotlah : Citation + Rs 30,000/-

3.  Tisi: Citation + Rs 20,000/-

Best Media in fire prevention award pawh sem niin a hnuaia tarlante hian lawmman an dawng .

1. Kawleng Daily Newspaper

2. ⁠Moonlight Daily Newspaper

3. ⁠Maraland Daily Newspaper

Vawiin programme ah hian Pu Vabeikhaihmo Solo, CF MADC chuan hunserh a hmang a, Hun kaihruaitu in lawmthu sawina neiin Green Mizoram Day inauguration  hun tihtawp a ni.

Vawiin inaugural programme zawh hian Mizoram sawrkar leh MADC a department hrang hrangte chuan Siaha khaw daiah fehchhuakin hmun hniha inthenin thing phunna run pui an nei bawk a ni.

958/2026-2027

Dr Marilyn Lalruatkimi, BDO E. Lungdar chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin VB-G RAM G chungchang a sawi a. VB-G RAM G in a tum ber thingtlang mite tana hmasawnna tur chungchang te bakah key focus  pali a neih chungchang te zirtirin a sawi zau a ni.

title: HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE MINISTER PI LALRINPUII COMMEMORATES MSHCS ISO CERTIFICATION AND AB PM-JAY AWARDS
content:
163/2026-2027

Aizawl, 11 June 2026:Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii today attended the commemoration ceremony marking the achievement of ISO Certification and the receipt of AB PM-JAY Awards by the Mizoram State Health Care Society (MSHCS). The programme was held at SAD Conference Hall-II, MINECO, Aizawl.

Congratulating MSHCS on securing the ISO Certification as well as two National Awards under Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB PM-JAY)—the Best State (Beneficiary Enrollment) Award and the Best Performing Small State Award for the Highest Number of Bio-Authentications in FY 2025–26—the Minister lauded the dedication, commitment and hard work of all officials and staff, including the Chief Executive Officer, who have contributed to the successful implementation of the Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme (MUHCS).

She stated that MUHCS has emerged as a flagship healthcare scheme for the people of Mizoram and assured that the Government would continue to strengthen and expand the scheme so that it remains responsive to the healthcare needs of the people.

Speaking in detail on MUHCS 2.0, the Minister highlighted that treatment in non-empanelled hospitals is now permitted only under three specified emergency situations:

1. Immediate ICU Admission– when a patient's condition is so critical that immediate admission to an Intensive Care Unit (ICU) is required and there is no practical opportunity for transfer to an empanelled hospital;

2. Urgent Life-Saving Surgery– when a patient requires an emergency surgical procedure to save life and any delay caused by referral or transfer could endanger the patient; and

3. Emergency Surgery Due to an Accident– when a patient sustains injuries in an accident and requires emergency surgery at the nearest available hospital, even if that hospital is not empanelled under MUHCS.

The Minister urged the public to familiarize themselves with these provisions, as they determine eligibility for reimbursement of treatment expenses incurred in non-empanelled hospitals. She noted that the revised provisions seek to ensure that routine and planned treatments are availed in Government or empanelled hospitals, while continuing to provide financial protection during genuine medical emergencies.

The Minister informed that since 1 April 2026, the Government has released ₹22.7 crore towards MUHCS claims, comprising ₹13.45 crore for treatments availed within Mizoram and ₹9.2 crore for treatments outside the State. She emphasized that timely settlement of hospital bills remains a priority of the Government and assured that all efforts are being made to ensure prompt and uninterrupted payments to healthcare institutions.

She further noted that the Government has significantly enhanced the MUHCS budget allocation from ₹50 crore during FY 2025–26 to ₹130 crore for FY 2026–27.

Encouraging greater public engagement with the scheme, the Minister highlighted the services of the MUHCS Chhawntu Call Centre, which has been established to address public queries and provide assistance regarding the scheme. She also urged citizens to regularly visit the official website of the Mizoram State Health Care Society (mshcs.mizoram.gov.in) for authentic information and updates relating to MUHCS.

Referring to treatment outside the State under MUHCS, the Minister stated that beneficiaries seeking treatment at empanelled hospitals outside Mizoram are generally required to obtain clearance from the Medical Refer Board. To improve accessibility for residents in districts where the Board is not physically available, the Government has introduced a virtual referral mechanism under the supervision of Medical Superintendents in each district, enabling patients to appear before the Medical Refer Board remotely.

Appealing for continued public support and cooperation, the Minister said, “I earnestly seek the support and cooperation of all citizens to ensure that MUHCS continues to serve as a dependable healthcare safety net for the people of Mizoram. I am hopeful that the financial burden and anxiety associated with medical treatment, which have long affected many families, will continue to be alleviated through the scheme.”

The ISO 9001:2015 Certification awarded to MSHCS was achieved under the Mizoram Health Systems Strengthening Project (MHSSP). The certification signifies compliance with internationally recognized Quality Management System standards.

The programme was chaired by Commissioner & Secretary, Health & Family Welfare Department, Pi K. Lalrinzuali. MSHCS Chief Executive Officer Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte delivered the keynote address. During the event, the Minister also presented prizes to the winners of the Reels Competition—Rody Lalthanzuali, Lalhminghlui and Vanlalchhuanga.

The ceremony was attended by World Bank Task Team Leader Dr. Navneet Kaur and other members of the World Bank team. Presentations highlighting the journey and achievements that led to MSHCS receiving the ISO Certification and AB PM-JAY Awards were delivered by Dr. Lalruatkima Pachuau and Dr. Lalbeiseia Renthlei.

Attachment

title: IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova leh Arunachal Pradesh University zirlaiten inkawmhona hun an nei
content:
957/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 11th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery(IPRP&S) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova leh Arunachal Pradesh University-a Mass Communication Post-Graduate 2nd year zirlaite chuan Minister pisaah inkawmhona hun an nei a ni.

A pisaa Arunachal Pradesh zirlaite an lo kal avang leh anmahni nena inkawmna hun nuam tak an neih theih avanga lawm thu sawiin, Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan hmarchhak state thalaite zingah hian thiamna leh theihna tam tak a awm a ni tih a sawi a; chutiang thiamna chu an hman chhuah theih nan rilru zau zawka ngaihtuahna hman te, an ngaihdan tlang taka sawichhuak ṭhin tur te, mahni inrintawkna neih pawimawh zia te leh mahni comfort zone atanga chhuah a pawimawh zia a hrilh a. Hemi bakah hian Minister chuan Arunachal Pradesh zirlaite chu hmarchhak state dangte nen thawhhona tha nei a, inunauna leh inpumkhatna rilru nei reng turin a chah bawk a; hei hian an mahni state chauh ni loin Hmarchhak bial leh India ram pum hmasawnna a thlen theih thu a sawi bawk a ni. Minister chuan zirlaite chu an hmalam hun atan duhsakna hlanin, eng lai pawhin puih an ngaihna apianga pui tur leh thawhho pui turin Mizoram leh a mipuite an inpeih reng a ni tih a hrilh bawk.

PIB Aizawl Head of Office Dr. Rajeev Lourembam chuan Central sector-a journalism chanchin a hrilhfiah a. Mass Communication an zir zawh hnua eizawnna kawng hrang hrang awm theite zirlaite hrilhin, tawnhriat ngah lehzual nan leh industry mamawh dante mila an thiamnate tipung zel turin zirlaite chu a chah a. Zalen chanchinbu editor leh Mizoram Journalist Association President Pu Vanlalrema Vantawl pawhin Mizoram-a journalism kalphung chu zirlaite hnenah a sawifiah bawk a ni.

PS to Minister Pu Remlalliana Hnamte pawhin thu sawiin, Social media avangin mi zawng zawng hi journalist ang an ni vek tawh tih a sawi a. Social media hian thatna tam tak a neih lai hian that lohna pawh a nei a. Hnam leh nihna (identity) hmanga khawtlang inthenna siam thei a ni tih sawiin, Arunachal Pradesh leh Hmarchhak bialah pawh hian hnam leh nunphung hrang hrang tam tak a awm avangin, fimkhur taka hma la a, inpumkhatna vawng him turin zirlaite chu a chah a ni.

He hunah hian The Frontier Despatch editor Pu Adam Saprinsanga pawhin chanchinbu khawvela a thil hriatte leh tawn tawhte zirlaite hnenah a sawi a. Journalism leh media hmang hian an bial ziarang, hnam nun, danglamna leh nihna dik takte chu khawvel hmaah an pholang thei a, pawn lam mipuite thlir dan pawh a ṭha zawngin an thlak danglam thei a ni tih hrilhfiahin, zirlaite chu thil eng pawh an tihna apiangah phur taka ti turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin inkawmna hun hi IPRP&S Department Joint Director Pi Mina Zoliani Joute in a kaihruai a. IPRP&S Deputy Director Pu Pratap Chhetri leh thuthar thehdarhtu dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP-AH GREEN MIZORAM DAY, 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
956/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 11thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Green Mizoram Day, 2026 hawnna Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall ah hman niin, Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L Khuma chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui. Green Mizoram Day, 2026 thupui atan Trees are green gold, the roots of all life (Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni) tih hman a ni.

Khuallian chuan thusawiin thilsiamte enkawl tur hian Pathianin mawhphurhna sang tak min pe a ni, a ti a. Mihringte mamawh tur engkim a siam hnuah mihring hi a siam a, a thilsiam, tha a tih em em te enkawl hi kan mawhphurhnaah a dah a. Kan mamawh leh kan dam khawchhuahna atana pawimawh em em te hi kan kuta awm an ni, a ti. Inmamawh tawn kan nih hriain, thingte an dam khawchhuah nana venhim hi kan mawhphurhna a ni a, kan nunna atana kan mamawh ber boruak thianghlim kan neih theih nan thing a pawimawh bakah, boruak a ti nuam a, nun a tinuam a ni, a ti a. Green Mizoram Day-a thing kan phun thinte an puitlin ngei theih nan theitawpa enkawl a tul thu sawiin, rangkachak ai maha hlu zawk, nunna min petu hi suat lovin enkawl tha zawk ang u, a ti a. Serchhip District chhunga Kangmei venna kawng a thawk tha lawmman a hlan nghal a ni. Lawmman dawngtute chu:

YMA Chanchinbu kangmei venna thu chhuah kawnga a titha te:

Dr. C. Vanlalnghaka, Asst. Professor, Department of Zoology, Govt Serchhip College chuan Green Mizoram Day thupui, 'Trees are green gold, the roots of all life" (Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni) tih chu a lem nena entirin a sawi a ni.

He hun kaihruaitu Dr. R. Lalnunrenga, DFO & Member Secretary, District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day chuan Serchhip District chuan Mizoram pumah kangmei venna kawngah an thawhhlawk zia sawiin, lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Pu C. Lalhminghlua, Honorary Wildlife Warden kaihruaiin Green Mizoram Day, 2026 thutiam (Pledge) sawi rual niin, hawnna hun hman a nih hnu hian Kikawn leh Keitum inkar kawngpui kamah thing tiak phun a ni.

Attachment

title: HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE MINISTER PI LALRINPUI’IN MIZORAM STATE HEALTH CARE SOCIETY (MSHCS) ISO CERTIFICATION LEH AB PM-JAY AWARD  DAWN HRIATRENGNA HUN HMANG
content:
955/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 11th June 2026:Vawiin khan Health & Family Welfare changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan SAD Conference Hall-2, MINECO-a Mizoram State Health Care Society (MSHCS)-in ISO (International Organization for Standardization) certification leh AB PM-JAY Award  a dawn hriatrengna (commemoration) ceremony a hmanpui.

Minister chuan Mizoram State Health Care Society (MSHCS)-in ISO certification mai bakah National Award chi hnih (PM-JAY hnuaiah BEST STATE – Beneficiary Enrollment Award leh BEST PERFORMING SMALL STATE – Highest No. of ‘Bio-Authentication’ done in FY 2025-26 Award) tun hnaia a dawng thei chu a lawmpui thu sawiin, MUHCS tluang taka kalpui a nih theihna tura ngaihtuahna, tha leh zung sengtu zawng zawngte leh CEO leh staff-te inpekna chhuanawm a ti a.  MUHCS (Mizoram Universal HealthCare Scheme) hi Zoram mipui tana scheme chhenfakawm a nih chhunzawm zel theih nan Sawrkar chuan tha thlah loin scheme hmasawnna tur kawng a dap chhunzawm zel dawn, tiin Pi Lalrinpuii chuan a sawi bawk.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan MUHCS 2.0 chungchang sawi zauvin empanelled hospital (sawrkar damdawiin thawhpui) mai ni lova MUHCS hmanga damdawiin danga enkawlna dawn theihna tur Emergency criteria (tehna) pathum -:

1.Accident avanga emergency-a surgery (inzaipui) neih a ngaihin

2.Rikrum thil avanga nunna chhanna tura surgery mamawh avangin

3.Damlo na zual ICU-a admit ngai nghalte tan siam a ni a. Empanelled damdawiin nilova inenkawlna senso hmuh let theih leh theih loh dan hriltu a nih avangin heng criteria pathumte hi hrechiang turin mipuite a chah a ni.

Sawrkar chuan April Ni 1, 2026 hnulamah MUHCS bill atan cheng ₹Vaibelchhe 22.7 (Mizoram chhunga inenkawlna: ₹Vaibelchhe 13.45 leh Mizoram pawna inenkawlna: ₹Vaibelchhe 9.2) dawmdawiin hnenah a pe chhuak tawh a. A hun taka damdawiin hnena bill pek chhuah hi sawrkarin a ngai pawimawh a, khaihlak awmloa dawmdawiin hnena bill pek chhuah zel a nih theih nan sawrkar chuan theihtawp a chhuah, a ti a. Kum 2025-2026 chhung atana cheng ₹Vaibelchhe 50 budget-a sawrkarin a dah chu kum 2026-2027-ah cheng ₹Vaibelchhe 130-ah a tihpun thu Minister chuan a sawi bawk.

H&FW Minister chuan MUHCS chungchanga mipuite’n zawh chian duh an neih chuan ‘MUHCS Chhawntu’ Call Centre an kalpui mek thu leh he Call Centre hi tangkai taka mipuiin an hman theih a duh thu a sawi a. MUHCS nihphung leh MUHCS chungchanga sawrkar thu chhuak hrang hrang mipui ten an hriat zung zung theih nan Mizoram State Health Care Society official website (mshcs.mizoram.gov.in) chu tlawh thin turin mipuite a chah bawk a ni.

MUHCS hmanga state pawn empanelled hospital-a enkawlna mamawh ten Medical Refer Board an paltlang hmasak a ngaih thin thu sawiin, Refer Board awmlohna khuaa cheng ten awlsam zawka Refer Board an hmachhawn theihna turin sawrkar chuan district tina Medical Superintendent-te kaihhruaina hnuaia virtual-a damlo ten Medical Refer Board an hmachhawn thei tawh thu a sawi a. “MUHCS hi Zoram mipui tana scheme thlamuanpui tlak ni chhunzawm zel turin Mizo mipui zawng zawngte thlawpna leh thawhpuina ka dil a. Damloh nikhuaa inenkawlna senso phurrit ni thin leh chhungkaw tam tak tana lungngaihna thlentu ni thin chu MUHCS hmanga sut kian a nih zel theih ka beisei a ni,” tiin Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan a sawi bawk.

Mizoram State Health Care Society-in ISO certification a hmuh hi Mizoram Health System Strengthening Project(MHSSP) hnuaia hmalakna a ni a. He ISO 9001:2015 certification a hmuh hi Quality Management System  tehfung hrang hrang a paltlang tihna a ni.

Vawiin ceremony-ah hian H&FW Dept. Commissioner & Secretary Pi K. Lalrinzuali chu chairperson niin he inkhawm hi a kaihruai a, MSHCS Chief Executive Officer Dr Lalhriatzuali Ralte chuan Keynote address neiin, Reels Competition-a lawmman dawngtute: Rody Lalthanzuali, Lalhminghlui leh Vanlalchhuanga hnenah Minister chuan lawmman a hlan bawk a. He hunah hian World Bank task team atangin Team Leader Dr. Navneet Kaur leh team member dangten rawn telpuiin Dr Lalruatkima Pachuau leh Dr Lalbeiseia Renthlei te atangin MSCHS-in ISO Certification leh AB PM-JAY award an dawnna kalkawng thlirletna thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

title: Rural Development & Administration Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma’n ‘Enabling Sustainable Livelihoods in Mizoram’ Sawihona a Hmanpui
content:
954/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 11th May, 2026 :Rural Development & Administration Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan vawiin khan Secretariat Conference Hall - 1-ah Mizoram sawrkar leh Bharat Rural Livelihoods Foundation (BRLF) te bultumin ‘Enabling Sustainable Livelihoods in Mizoram’ (Mizoramah Eizawnna Ngelnghet Din Theih Dan) sawihona a hmanpui.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan BRLF Team te chu zirchianna tha leh fiah tak an neih theih avangin lawmthu a hrilh a, hna tha thawk tur chuan ruahman lawkna (plan) tha a pawimawh a, BRLF te zirchianna chuan Mizorama hna thaw dan tur ruang am siam kawngah pawh a puih ngei a ring. ‘Sustainability’ chu a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin kalkawng thui tak zawh tur a la awm, a ti a; eizawnna ngelnghet nei turin tui hna neih that a tul a, chuvangin kan tui hna te kan venhim a ngaih thu a sawi bawk. Eizawnna ngelnghet din kawngah political will a pawimawh rualin, mipuiten an ta anga an ngaih theih turin project siam a pawimawh ber thu a sawi a ni.

Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to the Chief Minister chuan Bana Kaih hnuaia eizawnna ngelnghet nei thei tura Mizoram sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangte sawi fiahna hun a hmang a. Bana Kaih hnuaiah progress partner 1399 (za zela 36 chuang) te chuan industry kaihhnawi an thlan avangin Mizoramah pawh industry lian a awm ve thuai a besei thu a sawi. Kut hnathawktute’n an thlai hralhna tur pawh a ngaihtuah sak zel a, hei hian Bana Kaih chu market driven focus a nih zia a tarlang, a ti.

Pu Kuldip Singh, BRLD-a Chief Executive Officer (CEO) chuan Mizoram sawrkar hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, Mizoram chu leilung hausakna ngah tak ram a ni a, chu chu eizawnna ngelnghet din nan a pawimawh thu a sawi. BRLF chu kum 2013 khan sawrkar laipuiin Ministry of Rural Development hnuaia independent society a din a ni a, state sorkar hrang hrang leh tualchhung mipui pawl (community based organisations) te nen thawkhoin hma an lak thin thu a sawi. BRLF leh Mizoram sawrkar chuan nikum 2025 khan inremna (MOU) an lo ziak tawh a ni.

Dr. Aruna Pandey leh Dr. Syed Rouhulla, BRLF atanga lo kalte chuan Mizorama an zirchhianna te sawi zauna hun an hmang a. District pangaah (Aizawl, Lunglei, Champhai, Mamit leh Saitual) zirna hi an kalpui a, chhungkua (household) 622 leh mihring 2710 te an zirchianna atangin Mizoramah eizawnna ngelnghet din a nih theih nan marketing (hralh chhuah) lamah tan lak a ngaih thu te; sik leh sa inthlak hmachhawn thei tura lo neih dan (agricultural practices) her rem te; eizawnna, a bik takin horticulture-ah hmeichhiate hnathawh leh sum hmuh (earning) inthlau lutuk tih ziaawm te leh Mizorama mipuite leh tlawmngai pawlte nena thawhhona tha tak awm sa zulzuia BRLF chuan hnathawh a tul thu an sawi.

Vawiin programme-ah hian Pu V. Lalengmawia, Rural Development & Administration Department Additional Secretary bakah MzSRLM hotute leh department hrang hrang - Agriculture, Horticulture, Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Veterinary Department leh department hotu dangte an tel a ni.

Pu Brajesh Dubey, BRLF Head (Programme)  chuan sawihona (discussion) chu kaihruaiin, lawmthu sawina in programme chu a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: AMCRDA HRUIATUTEN INSAKNA ROD SIZE DIK LO CHUNGCHANG MINISTER THLEN
content:
953/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 11TH June 2026 :Food Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs changtu Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chu vawiin khan a pisa ah All Mizoram Cement & Rod Dealer Association (AMCRDA) hruaitute chuan an hmu a. Mizoram chhunga rod lakluh size diklo awm thin chungchang an sawipui.

AMCRDA hruaitute chuan hmun thenkhat atanga Mizoram chhunga rod lakluh te chuan an standard size a pha lo tih an finfiah a, an lo enchian tawhna ah 10mm tur 8.5mm te, 20mm tur 18.5mm te, 16mm tur 14mm a siam a tam thu sawiin, rod size tlinglo   hman  hian insak chu a chak tur leh ngheh tur ang a thlenpui zawhloh avangin mipui tan a him lo thu an thlen a. Rod standard size dik chauh lakluh dan ngaihtuahpui turin Minister an ngen a ni.

Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan standard size pha lo rod a awm ni a sawi chu pawi a tih thu tarlangin Mizo mipuite himna a khawih avangin he thu hi a lak thutak thu a sawi a. Lirnghing natna hmun- Seismic Zone V a awm kan nih avangin kan insak te chu mithiamte ruahman ang leh bungrua pawh chutiang mil ang hman chu a pawimawh thu a sawi a. AMCRDA hruaitute thu thlen bawhzui turin kawng hrang hrang a hmalak a tul thu sawiin Minister chuan Home Dept., Legal Metrology, PWD, YMA te leh NGO dangte nen pawha thawk hoa hmalak dan ngaihtuah a tul thu a sawiin, Minister chuan a rang lama meeting lian zawk koh thuai a tum thu AMCRDA hruaitute a hrilh a.  Rod diklo te hi finfiahna nen a dik lohna pholan a mipui hmuha tlangzarh a tul thu a sawi a bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH DISTRICT LEVEL IMPLEMENTING COMMITTEE(DLIC) ON MISSION SHAKTI THUKHAWM
content:
952/2026-2027

Saitual the 11th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Hub for Empowerment Of Women(DHEW),Women and Child Development hnuaiah District Level Implementing Committee on Mission Shakti chu Chairperson leh DC ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi, IAS kaihhruainain meeting neih a ni a, he meeting ah hian Pu V Lalhmingliana, Child Development Project Officer, i/c District Programme Officer & Convener, DLIC(Mission Shakti) chuan an hmalakna tlangpuite PPT hmangin report a pe a, zawhna awm theite bakah sawifiahnate neihzui a ni bawk.

Chairperson leh DC ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawiin line department hrang hrangte nena thawhhona chungchangah hlawk zawka thawka theihtawp chuan thar turin a sawm a, mahni zawn theuh bakah chak taka hna thawh a nih theih nan thawhhona tha a pawimawh zia a sawi bawk.

Vawiin meeting ah hian Mission Shakti, Saitual tana Annual Action Plan (2026-2027)budget thlirho a ni a, heng bakah hian Saitual District tana sum leh pai leh a ataka tihhlawhtlin tawhte, PMMVY hnuaia hamthatna pek chhuah tawh dante, department dangte nena thawhho dan hrang hrangte bakah Mission Shakti hnuaia case hrang hrang awmte chu thlirho niin harsatna leh rawtna an neihte bawrhsap hnenah an thlen bawk a ni.

Meeting ah hian Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO(S), Pi Mary L Rodinpuii, EO & Chairperson, ICC, DC Saitual, Pu R Vanlalfaka, SDC, Pu Laldingliana, District Education Officer ,Pu V Lalhmingliana, CDPO, Mission Shakti, Pi Mary Malsawmkimi, DMC, WCD te bakah line department-te an kal tha hle a, biakhlatna hmangin line department thenkhat an tel thei bawk.
